# UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018

Jurisdiction: United Kingdom
Region: UK
Citation: Data Protection Act 2018
Authority: UK Government / ICO
Source URL: https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/2018/12/contents
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, processor_contracts, cross_border_transfer, retention_deletion, security_breach, automated_decision_making, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: UK GDPR, Data Protection Act 2018, ICO, personal data, special category data, international transfers, UK addendum, 英国, 个人数据, 跨境传输

## Summary
UK data protection regime built around UK GDPR principles and the Data Protection Act 2018, covering general processing, law enforcement processing, intelligence services processing, exemptions, and enforcement.

## Key compliance obligations
- Follow UK GDPR principles: lawfulness, fairness, transparency, purpose limitation, data minimisation, accuracy, storage limitation, integrity, confidentiality, and accountability.
- Provide privacy information and support individual rights.
- Apply UK transfer mechanisms for restricted transfers outside the UK.
- Meet ICO accountability, security, and breach notification expectations.
